query:
WITH message AS (
                SELECT id
                FROM comms_messages
                WHERE id = $2 AND channel_id = $1
            ),
            deleted AS (
                DELETE FROM comms_reactions r
                USING message m
                WHERE r.message_id = m.id
                  AND r.emoji = $3
                  AND r.user_id = $4
            )
            SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM message) AS "exists!"
